# Skill: Slide Writing

## Input
- Raw explanation or code

## Output
- Slide title
- 3–5 concise bullets OR one code snippet

## Rules
- No full sentences unless necessary
- No punctuation at end of bullets
- Use parallel structure
- Place file in `slides/act-NN-descriptive-words/NN-short-name.md` (numbering resets per act)

## Speaker notes format
```
<!-- DELIVERY CUE — what to do or say first

- Group label
  - point
  - point

- Group label
  - point
  - point

BRIDGE — punchline or link to next slide -->
```

## Example
Bad:
- GraphQL allows clients to fetch exactly the data they need

Good:
- Client-defined response shape
- No over-fetching
- One request, multiple resources
